name: @axon/parser
description: AXON language parser — .ax source to portable IR JSON (WASM)

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --lib --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --features wasm && wasm-bindgen --target nodejs --out-dir pkg/node target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/axon_parser.wasm && wasm-bindgen --target bundler --out-dir pkg/bundler target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/axon_parser.wasm && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/axon_parser.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz pkg/axon_parser_bg.wasm -o pkg/axon_parser_bg.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz pkg/node/axon_parser_bg.wasm -o pkg/node/axon_parser_bg.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz pkg/bundler/axon_parser_bg.wasm -o pkg/bundler/axon_parser_bg.wasm
